title: ranunculus repens var. nitidus
intro: Ranunculus repens var. nitidus, also known as a smooth creeping buttercup, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antibacterial activities. Ranunculus repens var. nitidus can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, although its use should be carefully monitored due to potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
